title: Principal Plant Manager at Tata Steel Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Principal Plant Manager at Tata Steel Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Tata Steel Digital Technologies! We are hiring a Plant Manager for our Chennai team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Tata Steel Digital Technologies:
Tata Steel Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in ISO 9001

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Steel Digital Technologies!
